subject: URGENT: Contract renewal deadline — final extension
body:
Hi,

This is a final reminder that our enterprise contract (#ENT-2024-8821) expires on March 28, 2026. We've been waiting for your team's sign-off for two weeks now. If we do not receive a signed copy by EOD Friday, we will be forced to suspend services and escalate to legal.

Please treat this as the highest priority. I need a confirmed meeting with your legal and finance team before Thursday to go over the revised terms.

Rajesh Mehta
VP Partnerships, BigClient Inc.

subject: New meeting scheduled: Product sync with Priya Sharma — Tuesday 25 Mar, 3:00 PM
body:
Priya Sharma has scheduled a meeting with you.

Event: Q2 Product Roadmap Sync
Date: Tuesday, March 25, 2026
Time: 3:00 PM – 4:00 PM IST
Location: Google Meet — meet.google.com/abc-defg-hij

Added to your Google Calendar automatically. Reply to this email if you need to reschedule.

subject: Action required: Submit your Q1 self-assessment by March 31
body:
Hi team,

This is a reminder that Q1 performance self-assessments are due by March 31, 2026.

Please complete the following:
1. Fill out the self-assessment form on Workday
2. List your top 3 achievements for Q1
3. Identify 2 areas of improvement
4. Nominate a peer reviewer
5. Schedule a 1:1 with your manager before April 5

Log in at workday.company.com to get started. Reach out to hr@company.com with any questions.

subject: Re: Re: Re: Integration API keys — still broken
body:
Hey,

Following up again on this. It's been 6 days since I first reported the issue and our integration is still down. Our dev team has checked on their end and confirmed it is definitely an API key/permission issue on your side.

We're losing data every hour this is not resolved. Can someone PLEASE escalate this to your engineering team today?

— Ananya

---
Previous message (Mar 20): Hi, any update on this?
Previous message (Mar 18): Hi, the API keys you sent aren't working. Getting 403 Forbidden on all endpoints.

thread.snippet: The API keys you sent aren't working. Getting 403 Forbidden.

subject: This week in product: AI agents, Figma updates & the death of the PRD
body:
Good morning!

Here's your weekly digest:

• OpenAI launches GPT-5 with native tool use
• Figma rolls out AI-powered layout suggestions
• Is the traditional PRD dead? 3 PMs weigh in
• Notion vs Linear: Which wins for eng teams?

Read the full stories at productdigest.io/this-week

Unsubscribe | Manage preferences

subject: Budget approval needed — Q2 marketing spend ($48,000)
body:
Hi,

We need your sign-off on the Q2 marketing budget before we can release funds. The proposal is attached. Key line items:

- Digital ads (Google/Meta): $22,000
- Conference sponsorship (SaaSConf 2026): $15,000
- Content production: $11,000

Total: $48,000 — within the approved annual envelope.

Please approve or send back with comments by Wednesday EOD so finance can process before quarter start.

Thanks,
Deeepak

subject: Quick intro + potential partnership opportunity
body:
Hi,

I'm Vikram, co-founder at Startup.io — we build AI-powered customer analytics tools for B2B SaaS companies.

I came across your product at SaaSConf last month and think there's a strong integration opportunity between our platforms. We already integrate with 12 tools in your space and our mutual customers keep asking for this.

Would you be open to a 20-minute intro call next week? Happy to work around your schedule.

Best,
Vikram

subject: GDPR audit notice — response required within 14 days
body:
Dear Data Controller,

This notice is to inform you that ComplianceHQ has initiated a routine GDPR audit of your data processing activities under Article 58(1) of the General Data Protection Regulation.

You are required to provide the following within 14 days:
1. A copy of your current data processing register
2. Evidence of consent mechanisms for EU users
3. Your Data Protection Officer contact details
4. Records of any data breaches in the past 12 months

Failure to respond may result in escalation to the relevant supervisory authority.

ComplianceHQ Legal Team

subject: Re: Series B — term sheet ready for review
body:
Hi,

Great news — the partnership has approved the term sheet. I'm attaching the draft for your review.

Key terms:
- Valuation: $42M pre-money
- Investment: $8M
- Lead: Horizon Ventures
- Board seat: Yes (1 observer)
- Pro-rata rights: Yes

Our legal team will reach out to yours directly to schedule a call this week. Please review and flag any questions by Thursday.

Excited to move forward!

Sara Chen
Principal, Horizon Ventures

subject: Security alert: vulnerable dependency found in email-triage
body:
GitHub has detected a vulnerability in a dependency used by your repository email-triage.

Severity: HIGH
Package: express (4.18.3)
Vulnerability: Prototype pollution via query string parsing
Recommended fix: Upgrade to express@4.19.0 or later

This vulnerability could allow an attacker to modify object prototypes. We recommend updating as soon as possible.

View the full security advisory at github.com/advisories/GHSA-xxxx

subject: Onboarding call — can we move to Thursday 10AM?
body:
Hi there,

Hope you're well! I wanted to check if we could reschedule our onboarding call from Wednesday 2PM to Thursday March 26 at 10:00 AM IST?

Our CTO just flagged a conflict on Wednesday and Thursday works better for the whole team.

Zoom link stays the same: zoom.us/j/987654321

Please confirm and I'll update the calendar invite.

Thanks!
Meera

subject: Top stories: LLMs in production, Rust 2.0, and why startups fail
body:
Today's top stories on Hacker News:

1. The hidden costs of running LLMs in production (1.2k points)
2. Rust 2.0 RFC: What's changing and why (987 points)
3. Why 90% of well-funded startups still fail — a post-mortem (876 points)
4. I built a $10k/month SaaS in 3 months — here's what I learned (754 points)
5. Google's new TPU v5 benchmarks are wild (621 points)

Read at news.ycombinator.com

Unsubscribe from this digest

subject: Exciting opportunity: VP Engineering at a Series B AI startup
body:
Hi,

I came across your profile and wanted to reach out about an exciting leadership opportunity.

Our client is a well-funded AI startup (Series B, $40M raised) looking for a VP of Engineering to lead a 30-person team.

Key details:
- Role: VP Engineering
- Location: Remote-first (India/Singapore)
- Comp: ₹1.2–1.8 Cr + equity
- Stage: Series B, growing fast

Would you be open to a confidential 15-minute conversation?

Best,
Nisha Kapoor
TechRecruit.io

subject: ⚠️ Your PayPal account has been LIMITED — verify immediately
body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected unusual activity on your PayPal account. Your account has been LIMITED until you verify your identity.

To restore full access, click the link below and verify your information within 24 hours:

VERIFY NOW: paypa1-verify.com/secure/login

Failure to verify will result in permanent account suspension and loss of funds.

PayPal Security Department

Note: This is an automated security alert. Do not reply to this email.

subject: Confidential: Unclaimed inheritance of $4.7 Million — requires your assistance
body:
Dear Friend,

I am Dr. James Wilson, a legal practitioner in London, UK. I am contacting you regarding the unclaimed estate of a deceased client who shares your surname.

As the deceased passed without a will and next of kin, the sum of $4,700,000 USD is currently held in escrow. I require a trusted foreign partner to assist in the legal transfer of these funds.

You will receive 40% ($1,880,000) for your assistance. This transaction is 100% legal and risk-free.

Please respond with utmost confidentiality to proceed.

Dr. James Wilson
Wilson & Associates Legal

subject: Design proposal for your brand refresh — portfolio attached
body:
Hi,

I'm Rohan, a UI/UX designer with 6 years of experience working with B2B SaaS companies. I came across your product and noticed some areas where a design refresh could significantly improve conversion and user retention.

I've put together a brief proposal and sample concepts specifically for your platform. Happy to share the full portfolio.

My recent work includes:
- Dashboard redesign for FinTech startup (40% improvement in task completion)
- Onboarding flow for HR SaaS (reduced drop-off by 28%)
- Design system for 50-person product team

Would you be open to a 20-minute call to explore this?

Best,
Rohan Verma
designstudio.in
